contents: (* We require this now, but will import later. *)

(** * Pushout as a colimit *)

(** In this file, we define [PO] the pushout of two maps as the colimit of a particular diagram, and then show that it is equivalent to [pushout] the primitive pushout defined as an HIT. *)


(** ** [PO] *)

Definition Build_span_cocone {f : A -> B} {g : A -> C} {Z : Type}
             (inl' : B -> Z) (inr' : C -> Z)
             (pp' : inl' o f == inr' o g)
    : Cocone (span f g) Z.

goals.conclusion: Cocone (span f g) Z

hypotheses.type: inl' o f == inr' o g

goals.conclusion: Cocone (span f g) Z

hypotheses.type: inl' o f == inr' o g

goals.conclusion: forall i : span_graph, span f g i -> Z

hypotheses.type: inl' o f == inr' o g

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : span_graph) (g0 : span_graph i j),
?legs j o (span f g) _f g0 == ?legs i

hypotheses.type: inl' o f == inr' o g

goals.conclusion: forall i : span_graph, span f g i -> Z

hypotheses.type: inl' o f == inr' o g

contents: intros [|[]]; [ exact (inr' o g) | exact inl' | exact inr' ].

forall (i j : span_graph) (g0 : span_graph i j),
(fun i0 : span_graph =>
 match i0 as s return (span f g s -> Z) with
 | inl u => unit_name (inr' o g) u
 | inr b =>
     (fun b0 : Bool =>
      match b0 as b1 return (span f g (inr b1) -> Z) with
      | true => inl'
      | false => inr'
      end) b
 end) j
o (span f g) _f g0 ==
(fun i0 : span_graph =>
 match i0 as s return (span f g s -> Z) with
 | inl u => unit_name (inr' o g) u
 | inr b =>
     (fun b0 : Bool =>
      match b0 as b1 return (span f g (inr b1) -> Z) with
      | true => inl'
      | false => inr'
      end) b
 end) i

hypotheses.type: inl' o f == inr' o g

goals.conclusion:
(fun x : A =>
 match b' as b return ((if b then B else C) -> Z) with
 | true => inl'
 | false => inr'
 end
   (match b' as b return (Unit -> A -> if b then B else C) with
    | true => unit_name f
    | false => unit_name g
    end tt x)) ==
(fun x : A => inr' (g x))

contents:
Definition pol' {f : A -> B} {g : A -> C} {Z} (Co : Cocone (span f g) Z)
    : B -> Z
    := legs Co (inr true).

Definition por' {f : A -> B} {g : A -> C} {Z} (Co : Cocone (span f g) Z)
    : C -> Z
    := legs Co (inr false).

Definition popp' {f : A -> B} {g : A -> C} {Z} (Co : Cocone (span f g) Z)
    : pol' Co o f == por' Co o g
    := fun x => legs_comm Co (inl tt) (inr true) tt x
                @ (legs_comm Co (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^.
Definition is_PO (f : A -> B) (g : A -> C) := IsColimit (span f g).
Definition PO (f : A -> B) (g : A -> C) := Colimit (span f g).
Definition pol : B -> PO f g := colim (D:=span f g) (inr true).
Definition por : C -> PO f g := colim (D:=span f g) (inr false).

Definition popp (a : A) : pol (f a) = por (g a)
    := colimp (D:=span f g) (inl tt) (inr true) tt a
          @ (colimp (D:=span f g) (inl tt) (inr false) tt a)^.
(** We next define the eliminators [PO_ind] and [PO_rec]. To make later proof terms smaller, we define two things we'll need. *)

Definition PO_ind_obj (P : PO f g -> Type) (l' : forall b, P (pol b))
    (r' : forall c, P (por c))
    : forall (i : span_graph) (x : obj (span f g) i), P (colim i x).

goals.conclusion: forall (i : span_graph) (x : span f g i), P (colim i x)
forall (i : span_graph) (x : span f g i), P (colim i x)
P (colim (inl u) x)
P (colim (inr true) x)
P (colim (inr false) x)
P (colim (inl u) x)

contents: exact (@colimp _ (span f g) (inl u) (inr true) tt x # l' (f x)).

goals.conclusion: P (colim (inr true) x)
P (colim (inr false) x)

contents:
Definition PO_ind_arr (P : PO f g -> Type) (l' : forall b, P (pol b))
    (r' : forall c, P (por c)) (pp' : forall a, popp a # l' (f a) = r' (g a))
    : forall (i j : span_graph) (e : span_graph i j) (ar : span f g i),
      transport P (colimp i j e ar) (PO_ind_obj P l' r' j (((span f g) _f e) ar)) =
        PO_ind_obj P l' r' i ar.

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : span_graph) (e : span_graph i j) (ar : span f g i),
transport P (colimp i j e ar) (PO_ind_obj P l' r' j (((span f g) _f e) ar)) =
PO_ind_obj P l' r' i ar

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, transport P (popp a) (l' (f a)) = r' (g a)

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : span_graph) (e : span_graph i j) (ar : span f g i),
transport P (colimp i j e ar) (PO_ind_obj P l' r' j (((span f g) _f e) ar)) =
PO_ind_obj P l' r' i ar

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, transport P (popp a) (l' (f a)) = r' (g a)

goals.conclusion:
forall ar : A,
transport P (colimp (inl u) (inr b') tt ar)
  (match
     b' as b return (forall x : if b then B else C, P (colim (inr b) x))
   with
   | true => fun x : B => l' x
   | false => fun x : C => r' x
   end
     (match b' as b return (Unit -> A -> if b then B else C) with
      | true => unit_name f
      | false => unit_name g
      end tt ar)) =
transport P (colimp (inl u) (inr true) tt ar) (l' (f ar))

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, transport P (popp a) (l' (f a)) = r' (g a)

transport P (colimp (inl u) (inr true) tt ar) (l' (f ar)) =
transport P (colimp (inl u) (inr true) tt ar) (l' (f ar))

forall ar : A,

Definition PO_ind (P : PO f g -> Type) (l' : forall b, P (pol b))
    (r' : forall c, P (por c)) (pp' : forall a, popp a # l' (f a) = r' (g a))
    : forall w, P w
    := Colimit_ind P (PO_ind_obj P l' r') (PO_ind_arr P l' r' pp').

Definition PO_ind_beta_pp (P : PO f g -> Type) (l' : forall b, P (pol b))
    (r' : forall c, P (por c)) (pp' : forall a, popp a # l' (f a) = r' (g a))
    : forall x, apD (PO_ind P l' r' pp') (popp x) = pp' x.

goals.conclusion: forall x : A, apD (PO_ind P l' r' pp') (popp x) = pp' x

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, transport P (popp a) (l' (f a)) = r' (g a)

goals.conclusion: forall x : A, apD (PO_ind P l' r' pp') (popp x) = pp' x

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, transport P (popp a) (l' (f a)) = r' (g a)

goals.conclusion: apD (PO_ind P l' r' pp') (popp x) = pp' x

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, transport P (popp a) (l' (f a)) = r' (g a)

goals.conclusion:
(transport_pp P (colimp (inl tt) (inr true) tt x)
   (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^ (PO_ind P l' r' pp' (pol (f x))) @
 ap (transport P (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^)
   (apD (PO_ind P l' r' pp') (colimp (inl tt) (inr true) tt x))) @
apD (PO_ind P l' r' pp') (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^ = 
pp' x

(transport_pp P (colimp (inl tt) (inr true) tt x)
   (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^ (PO_ind P l' r' pp' (pol (f x))) @
 ap (transport P (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^)
   (PO_ind_arr P l' r' pp' (inl tt) (inr true) tt x)) @
apD (PO_ind P l' r' pp') (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^ = 
pp' x

transport_pp P (colimp (inl tt) (inr true) tt x)
  (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^ (PO_ind P l' r' pp' (pol (f x))) @
moveR_transport_V P (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)
  (PO_ind P l' r' pp' (colim (inl tt) x))
  (PO_ind P l' r' pp' (colim (inr false) (((span f g) _f tt) x)))
  (apD (PO_ind P l' r' pp') (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x))^ =
pp' x

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, transport P (popp a) (l' (f a)) = r' (g a)

contents: rewrite (Colimit_ind_beta_colimp P _ _ (inl tt) (inr false) tt x).

goals.conclusion:
transport_pp P (colimp (inl tt) (inr true) tt x)
  (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^ (PO_ind P l' r' pp' (pol (f x))) @
moveR_transport_V P (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)

pp' x

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, transport P (popp a) (l' (f a)) = r' (g a)

goals.conclusion:
transport_pp P (colimp (inl tt) (inr true) tt x)
  (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^ (PO_ind P l' r' pp' (pol (f x))) @
((pp' x)^ @
 transport_pp P (colimp (inl tt) (inr true) tt x)
   (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^ (l' (f x)))^ =
pp' x

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, transport P (popp a) (l' (f a)) = r' (g a)

goals.conclusion:
transport_pp P (colimp (inl tt) (inr true) tt x)
  (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^ (PO_ind P l' r' pp' (pol (f x))) @
((transport_pp P (colimp (inl tt) (inr true) tt x)
    (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^ (l' (f x)))^ @
 pp' x) =

contents:
Definition PO_rec (P: Type) (l': B -> P) (r': C -> P)
    (pp': l' o f == r' o g) : PO f g -> P
    := Colimit_rec P (Build_span_cocone l' r' pp').

Definition PO_rec_beta_pp (P: Type) (l': B -> P)
    (r': C -> P) (pp': l' o f == r' o g)
    : forall x, ap (PO_rec P l' r' pp') (popp x) = pp' x.

goals.conclusion: forall x : A, ap (PO_rec P l' r' pp') (popp x) = pp' x

hypotheses.type: l' o f == r' o g

hypotheses.type: l' o f == r' o g

ap (PO_rec P l' r' pp')
  (colimp (inl tt) (inr true) tt x @ (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^) =
pp' x

hypotheses.type: l' o f == r' o g

goals.conclusion:
ap (PO_rec P l' r' pp') (colimp (inl tt) (inr true) tt x) @
ap (PO_rec P l' r' pp') (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^ = 
pp' x @ 1

hypotheses.type: l' o f == r' o g

goals.conclusion: ap (PO_rec P l' r' pp') (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^ = 1

hypotheses.type: l' o f == r' o g

contents:
1: exact (Colimit_rec_beta_colimp P (Build_span_cocone l' r' pp')
                (inl tt) (inr true) tt x).

goals.conclusion: ap (PO_rec P l' r' pp') (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x)^ = 1

hypotheses.type: l' o f == r' o g

goals.conclusion: (ap (PO_rec P l' r' pp') (colimp (inl tt) (inr false) tt x))^ = 1

             (inl tt) (inr false) tt x).
(** A nice property: the pushout of an equivalence is an equivalence. *)

#[export] Instance PO_of_equiv (Hf : IsEquiv f)
    : IsEquiv por.

   Pushout_rec Y (pol' Co) (por' Co) (popp' Co)) ==

{| legs := Co; legs_comm := Co' |}

forall i : span_graph,
cocone_postcompose
  (Build_span_cocone (fun x : B => push (inl x)) (fun x : C => push (inr x))
     pglue)
  (Pushout_rec Y (pol' {| legs := Co; legs_comm := Co' |})

(fun x : span f g i => Co j (((span f g) _f g0) x)) == Co i

goals.conclusion:
forall (i j : span_graph) (g0 : span_graph i j) (x : span f g i),
legs_comm
  (cocone_postcompose
     (Build_span_cocone (fun x0 : B => push (inl x0))

           (fun x : C => push (inr x)) pglue)
        h))
  (popp'
     (cocone_postcompose
        (Build_span_cocone (fun x : B => push (inl x))
           (fun x : C => push (inr x)) pglue)
        h)) ==
h

  (popp'
     (cocone_postcompose
        (Build_span_cocone (fun x : B => push (inl x))
           (fun x : C => push (inr x)) pglue)
        h))
  (pushl b) =
h (pushl b)

           (fun x : C => push (inr x)) pglue)
        h))
  (pushr c) =
h (pushr c)

forall a : A,
transport
  (fun w : Pushout f g =>
   Pushout_rec Y (fun x : B => h (push (inl x)))
     (fun x : C => h (push (inr x)))
     (popp'
        (cocone_postcompose

     w =

  (pglue a) (?Goal (f a)) =
?Goal0 (g a)

  (pglue a) ((fun b : B => 1) (f a)) =

1

  (Pushout_rec Y (fun x : B => h (push (inl x)))
     (fun x : C => h (push (inr x)))
     (popp'
        (cocone_postcompose
